status: AI draft extracted from clean transcript; original scans remain source of truth

entries.notes: Overcast sun breaking through light mist over the sea. Gentle south easterly wind. Air temperature 11°. Large rocks and pebbles piled against the sea wall. Exposed rocks on the beach. Lord’s Rock visible. Tide coming in. Quite turbid with some large breakers.

Overcast low heavy cloud. Light drizzle. Light north westerly breeze. Air temperature 10°. Tide coming in. Some big breakers. A strong seaward pull. Exposed rocks on the beach. Pebbles and stones piled against the sea wall.

Overcast. Sun trying to break through. Slight north easterly breeze. Air temperature 9°. The sand has been sucked from the beach leaving a lot of large rocks exposed. The sea has washed up a lot of pebbles and rocks. They are scattered across the top of the beach and against the sea wall. Debris is scattered along the promenade. The tide was coming in. Fairly calm but quite big breakers and a fairly strong undertow. Rocks and weed in the water.
Overcast. Light north westerly breeze. Air temperature 10°. Slight swell. Some quite large breakers. A lot of stones and pebbles on the beach. Sand further out.

Low broken cloud. Sunny intervals. Light north westerly breeze. Air temperature 11°. High tide. Flat calm. The marker buoy washed onshore by the recent storm has being removed from the rocks stones and exposed rock at the shoreline then sand. A few small breakers.

Bright sunshine. Light north westerly breeze. Air temperature 7°. Tide almost full. There are still exposed rocks on the top of the beach and stones and pebbles then sand. The sand is coming back. Flat calm with some gentle rolling breakers.
Bright sunshine. Light south easterly breeze. Air temperature 8°. Rising tide. Almost full. Rocks and pebbles at the top of the beach. Flat calm but some big powerful breakers.

Overcast. Thick low cloud. Drizzle next to no wind - very light south easterly. Air temperature 9°. Hazy mist out to sea. Turbulent breakers, some quite large. Strong pull north. There are still stones pebbles and boulders at the top of the beach although the sand has begun to come back. Lord’s Rock still visible.
Bright sunshine. Hardly any breeze. Air temperature 7°. Tide going out. Rocks and pebbles at the top of the beach. Sand and exposed rocks at the water line. Flat calm. Some small rolling waves.

Overcast. Heavy low cloud clearing. Sunny intervals. Very light south westerly wind. Air temperature 12°. There are still pebbles piled against the sea wall and rocks visible but the sand is gradually coming back. Tide coming in. Flat calm. Some small rolling waves.

Overcast at first then clearing a little and some sunny intervals. Air temperature 9°. Light northerly wind. Tide high and beginning to turn. A strong pull south. Some big breakers. The sand is gradually coming back. There are still stones and pebbles at the top of the beach and some exposed rocks. Lord’s Rock still visible.

Broken cloud. Sunny intervals. A strong northwesterly wind. Air temperature 6°. High tide and still coming in. Large powerful breakers and turbid surf. Because the sea was turbulent and very close to the sea wall, and because of the possibility of there being exposed rocks under the surface, it was decided that conditions were too dangerous to attempt to go in. No-one went in the water.

Light cloud. Thin watery sun. Slight south westerly breeze. Air temperature 6°. Tide coming in. Some big breakers. The sand is still coming back. There are still pebbles at the top of the beach and some exposed rocks. Law’s Rock is still visible.
Bright sunshine. Stiff westerly breeze. Air temperature 5°. Small stones and pebbles piled against the sea wall. Some exposed rocks on the beach. Law’s Rock still visible. Some big breakers.
Bright sunshine. High broken cloud. Air temperature 2°. Light north westerly breeze. Low tide on the turn. Some medium breakers. Pebbles against the sea wall. Exposed rocks.
Overcast. Low heavy cloud mist. Light westerly breeze. Air temperature 1°. Low tide. Rocks and pebbles. Flat calm.
Light cloud. Sun trying to break through. Light southerly breeze. Air temperature 8°. High tide. Some pebbles and rocks at the water’s edge then sand. Some big breakers. A strong pull north.
Overcast. Low heavy cloud. Air temperature 7°. Light south westerly breeze. High tide. Pebbles and rocks at the tideline. Some big breakers.
Cloudy and sunny, not much wind. Air temp 8°C. Low tide. Pebbles up the beach suggesting rough conditions in the week. NO pull.
Low broken cloud. Sunny intervals. A strong westerly breeze. Flat calm. Pebbles near the sea wall. Exposed rocks. Law’s Rock visible. Air temperature 12°.
Bright sunshine. Quite a strong westerly breeze. Air temperature 7°. Exposed rocks on the beach and some scattered pebbles. Pebbles piled against the wall. Flat calm.
High thin cloud. Sunny intervals. A strong westerly breeze. Air temperature 10°. High tide. Big breakers.

High thin cloud. Sun trying to break through. Very strong westerly wind. Air temperature 12°. Tide coming in almost full. Big breakers and spray driven by the wind. Mostly sand underfoot. A few rocks.
Overcast. High thin cloud. Sun trying to break through. Stiff westerly breeze. Air temperature 7°. Good covering of sand though Law’s Rock still visible. Some good medium breakers. Strong pull.
Bright sunshine. Stiff southerly breeze. Air temperature 7°. Low tide. Some medium breakers.
Bright sunshine. High scattered cloud. Stiff westerly breeze. Air temperature 7°. Low tide. Good covering of sand. Some medium breakers.
Overcast. Misty. Light southerly breeze. Air temperature 9°. Low tide. Big breakers. A strong pull north. Good covering of sand.
Overcast. High tide. Medium breakers. Some exposed rocks. A great deal of seaweed. Light southerly breeze. Air temperature 6°.
Overcast. Sun trying to break through. Stiff easterly breeze. Air temperature 5°. Tide coming in. Very strong pull north. Medium to large breakers. Good covering of sand. One or two exposed rocks.
Overcast. Low heavy unbroken cloud. Light south westerly breeze. Air temperature 5°. Tide going out. Good covering of sand. Medium breakers.
Bright sunshine. Air temperature 4°. Stiff north westerly breeze. Low tide. Medium breakers. Quite a strong pull. Good covering of sand. Some exposed rocks.
Overcast. Light south westerly breeze. Air temperature 2°. Low tide. Pebbles and exposed rocks. Pebbles piled against the sea wall. Large breakers.
Overcast. Brisk westerly breeze. Air temperature 5°. High tide. Rocks and pebbles. Flat calm but with big dumping breakers.

Light cloud. Sunny intervals. Stiff south westerly breeze. Air temperature 9°. High tide. Strong pull north. Rocks and pebbles underfoot. Pebbles piled against the sea wall. Turbid sea. Some quite big breakers.
Low heavy cloud. Drizzle. Stiff southerly breeze. Air temperature 7°. Tide coming in. Pebbles and exposed rocks at the top of the beach. Sand further out. Fairly calm. A gentle swell.
Bright sunshine. High broken cloud. A stiff westerly breeze. Air temperature 7°. Low tide. Flat calm. No breakers. A lot of pebbles along the top of the beach. Sand at the shoreline.
High thin cloud. Sun trying to break through. Light southerly breeze. Air temperature 9°. Flat calm but some medium breakers. Pebbles on the beach and exposed rocks. Sand beyond the surf line.
Bright sunshine. Light westerly breeze. Air temperature 6°. Low tide. A lot of pebbles on the beach. Exposed rocks. Medium breakers. A strong undertow.

Overcast. High thin cloud. Sun trying to break through. Fresh south westerly breeze. Air temperature 12°. Flat calm but very big breakers. Sand piled up at the sea wall and pebbles midway in the beach. Lord's Rock visible.

Overcast. Thick low cloud. South westerly breeze. Air temperature 9°. A few pebbles on the beach. Some exposed rocks. Law's Rock visible but the sand has mostly come back. Ebbing tide. Flat calm but still big dumping breakers. A strong pull out.
Light broken cloud. Sun trying to break through. Stiff westerly breeze. Air temperature 7°. High tide. Flat calm. Moderate breakers. Strong pull south.

Heavy low cloud. Strong easterly wind. Air temperature 6°. Driving rain. Tide coming in. Big breakers breaking close to shore. All rocks covered except Law's Rock. A few pebbles at the bottom of the steps.

Overcast. Low heavy cloud. Heavy rain then drizzle. Light westerly wind. Air temperature 7°. Heavy seas over the previous few days have scoured the sand from the beach leaving exposed rocks and piling stones and pebbles against the sea wall. Medium breakers. A strong pull out to sea. Uneven sea bed. Some rocks underwater.

Bright sunshine then increasingly heavy cloud. Light south westerly breeze. Air temperature 8°. Low tide. A lot of pebbles on the beach. Exposed rocks. There was also a large quantity of sea weed washed up against the sea wall which made getting onto the beach quite difficult. The sea was perfectly flat.

Bright sunshine. Light westerly breeze. Air temperature 10°. A tremendous amount of seaweed still piled against the sea wall. A great many rocks and pebbles on the beach. Exposed rocks amongst those that have been washed up by the sea. Tide going out. A strong pull out. The sand falling away sharply. Flat calm.
Bright sunshine. Light westerly breeze. Air temperature 11°. High tide. Going out. Still a lot of seaweed piled against the sea wall. A lot of pebbles and exposed rocks. Flat calm. Light surf.
Low heavy cloud. Air temperature 11°. Stiff south westerly breeze. Tide coming in. Still a lot of weed piled against the sea wall and a lot of stones and pebbles. Exposed rocks. No waves. No surf.

High thin broken cloud. Sun trying to break through. Air temperature 7°. Light south westerly breeze. Low tide coming in. Still seaweed piled against the sea wall. A lot of rocks and pebbles at the top of the beach, then sand, although a few pebbles and some weed in the water. Flat calm.
Bright sunshine. High thin cloud. Light north westerly breeze. Air temperature 5°. Low tide. Flat calm. Still a lot of rocks at the top of the beach and piled up weed.
Light cloud. Stiff south westerly breeze. Air temperature 7°. Low tide. Flat calm. Rocks pebbles and seaweed at the top of the beach.
High thin cloud. Sun trying to break through. Stiff easterly breeze. Air temperature 6°. Low tide. Small waves. No breakers. Pebbles and weed at the top of the beach.

High thin cloud. Sun breaking through. Light south easterly breeze. Air temperature 8°. Tide going out. Still pebbles and weed against the sea wall, but more sand on the beach. Some good big breakers and turbulent surf.

Overcast. Stiff easterly wind. The sand has covered the beach again though there are still pebbles piled against the sea wall. Law's Rock visible. No other exposed rocks. Tide coming in very fast. Big breakers. Surf. A strong pull north. Air temperature 7°.
Thick heavy cloud. Strong south easterly wind. Air temperature 7°. Exposed rocks on the beach. Very uneven underfoot in the water, but basically shallow a long way out. Small breakers.

Bright sunshine. Broken cloud. Brisk south westerly breeze. Air temperature 11°. Ebbing tide. Flat calm with a few small breakers. Recent heavy seas have piled pebbles and stones against the sea wall again, and scoured sand from the beach, exposing rocks. No exposed rocks underwater.
Low heavy cloud. Fine rain. Air temperature 11°. Light southerly breeze. Still a lot of rocks and pebbles on the beach. Some exposed rocks. Some big powerful breakers with quite a strong undertow.
Sunshine and cloud. Air temperature 12°. Light south westerly breeze. High tide. Rocks and pebbles at the waterline. Flat calm but some decent breakers.
Bright sunshine. High scattered cloud. Air temperature 9°. Strong westerly wind. Tide coming in. Almost full. Pebbles against the sea wall. Flat calm but, unusually, there were two rips.
Sunny intervals. Low broken cloud. Strong north westerly breeze. Air temperature 9°. Pebbles and rocks on the beach. Tide coming in. Some big breakers. Strong undertow.
Overcast. Low heavy cloud. Stiff northerly wind. Air temperature 6°. Rocks and pebbles on the beach. Sand towards the sea. Tide coming in moderate breakers.

Overcast heavy cloud thinning, sun trying to break through. Light easterly wind. Air temperature 8°. Almost complete flat calm but big breakers. Strong pull south. Good covering of sand. Law’s Rock still visible. Pebbles piled against the sea wall.
Sunny intervals. Very strong south westerly wind. Air temperature 12°. Good covering of sand. Law’s Rock almost covered. Sea flattened by the wind but there were still some medium sized breakers.
Low heavy cloud. Drizzle. Light north westerly breeze. Air temperature 8°. Low tide. Slight swell. Small breakers. Sand, some rocks, pebbles.
Overcast. Light south westerly breeze. Air temperature 13°. Low tide. Flat calm. Good covering of sand.
Bright sunshine. Broken cloud. Air temperature 10°. Low tide. Flat calm.
Bright sunshine. High thin broken cloud. Very strong north westerly breeze. Air temperature 8°. High tide. Very strong pull south. Turbid surf. Big breakers. Holes and dips in the sand underwater.
Bright sunshine. Strong northerly wind. Air temperature 8°. High tide. Strong swell. Some medium breakers. Strong pull south.
Sunny, high thin cloud. Brisk northerly breeze. Air temperature 8°. Good covering of sand. High tide. Some big breakers.
Sunny. Broken cloud. Light northerly breeze. Air temperature 8°. Low tide. Slight swell. Some medium breakers.
Sunny. Broken cloud. Light north easterly breeze. Air temperature 7°. Low tide. Some exposed rocks. Rocks and weed underwater. Small to medium breakers.
Low thick cloud. Heavy rain. Brisk north westerly breeze. Air temperature 7°. Low tide. Medium breakers.

Bright sunshine. High thin cloud. Brisk southeasterly breeze. Air temperature 13°. Tide going out. Good covering of sand. Just the tip of Law’s Rock visible. Choppy sea. Some medium breakers. A bit of a northerly pull.
Bright sunshine. High thin cloud getting heavier. Brisk north westerly wind. Air temperature 11°. High tide still coming in. Strong pull south. Strong undertow. Medium breakers. Turbulent surf.
Low heavy cloud. Light south westerly breeze. Air temperature 13°. Flat calm. Tide coming in.
Hazy. Thin cloud thickening. Light north east breeze. Air temperature 12. Sun trying to break through. Tide coming in. Flat calm.
Cloudy at first then sunshine and high broken cloud. Light north easterly breeze. Flat calm. Some small breakers. Good covering of sand.
Hazy sunshine. Light south easterly breeze. Air temperature 16°. Low tide. Flat calm. Very clear water. Some exposed rocks. Some weed.
Thick mist. Light south easterly breeze. Air temperature 14°. Low tide. Good covering of sand. Lumpy sea. No breakers.

Sunny then overcast. Low heavy cloud and mist out at sea. A lot of small pebbles on the beach. A few exposed rocks. The sand was very uneven and in places was very soft. Choppy sea. Some quite big breakers. Air temperature 13°.
Misty and hazy then sun breaking through. Light north easterly breeze. Air temperature 13°. Tide almost full. Some big breakers. A strong pull north.
Overcast. Misty. Light north easterly breeze. Air temperature 13°. High tide. Slightly choppy. Small breakers. (Club AGM).
Overcast. Low heavy cloud giving way to sunny intervals. Air temperature 13°. Light north easterly wind. Flat calm but some medium breakers.
Overcast but sun trying to break through. Light south easterly breeze. Air temperature 15°. Low tide. Flat calm. Murky sea. A lot of weed. Some exposed rocks.
Overcast. Light south easterly breeze. Air temperature 13°. Low tide. Exposed rocks and weed. Medium breakers. Strong pull and the tide beginning to run north.
Sunny. Big clouds, some grey and threatening rain. Light south westerly breeze. Air temperature 15°. Low tide. Exposed rocks. Good covering of sand beyond the surf. Flat calm.

Overcast. Low heavy cloud threatening rain from the west. Clearer out to sea but hazy. Light south easterly breeze. Air temperature 14°. Good covering of sand. Clear water. Lightly choppy sea. No surf. No rocks. No weed.
Overcast. High thinning cloud. Sun trying to break through. Strong northerly breeze. High tide. Turbid sea. Not very big surf but it was difficult to get in. Strong pull south. Air temperature 12°.
Bright sunshine. High tide. Strong pull south. Medium breakers. Light north easterly breeze. Air temperature 15°.
Overcast. Low heavy cloud. Tide coming in. Sand piled against the sea wall. Weed. Some exposed rocks and traces of sea coal. Small pebbles on the beach.
High thin broken cloud. Strong south westerly breeze. Sunny intervals. Air temperature 14°. Low tide. Flat calm. Exposed rocks and pebbles on the beach. Rocks and weed in the sea.
Broken cloud. Sunny intervals. Stiff north westerly breeze. Flat calm. Low tide. Sand piled against the sea wall. Law’s Rock not visible. Exposed rocks near the water line.

A mixture of heavy cloud and clear sky. A strong north westerly wind. Air temperature 11°. Tide going out. Some quite big breakers. Strong undertow. Tide running south. Some exposed rocks on the beach. Sand piled against the sea wall.
Overcast. Heavy cloud. Rain showers. Air temperature 15°. High tide. Current flowing north. Calm but some medium breakers. Some weed offshore.
Sunny intervals. Broken cloud - cumulus, grey and white, a promise (or threat) of rain. Air temperature 15°. Light south westerly breeze. High tide. Flat calm. No breakers or surf.
Overcast. Low heavy cloud, lifting slowly. Drizzle then clear. Light north easterly breeze. Air temperature 13°. Tide coming in. Almost high tide. Flat calm.

Sunny intervals. High thin broken cloud. Light southerly breeze. Air temperature 18°. Low tide. Flat calm. A mixture of thick sand near the sea wall then hard sand, rocks, weed and pebbles. Sandy underfoot offshore.

Bright sunshine. A few high clouds. Air temperature 18°. Light north westerly breeze. Low tide. Flat calm. Clear water. Exposed rocks and weed. A large metal object was half buried in the sand and recovered to the beach. Sand piled against the sea wall then more sand. Pebbles and a few exposed rocks.

Bright sunshine at first then overcast. Air temperature 18°. Sun trying to break through. Low tide. Flat calm. Tiny wavelets breaking onshore. Sand piled against the sea wall then a dip with exposed rocks and pebbles. Sand rising again towards the shore.

Sunny. Large fluffy clouds. Strong westerly breeze. Air temperature 16°. High tide going out. Sand piled against the sea wall then a dip with pebbles and some exposed rocks, then rising to the shoreline. No surf. Choppy.
Overcast. Low heavy cloud. Light northerly breeze. Air temperature 14°. High tide. Flat calm. Clear water.

Overcast at first then cloud clearing. Light north westerly breeze. Air temperature 15°. High tide still rising. Sand piled against the sea wall then a dip before rising again. A few exposed rocks, pebbles and stones. Flat calm but some medium breakers. Tide running north to south.
Broken cloud. Sunny intervals. Stiff westerly breeze. Air temperature 16°. Low tide. Exposed rocks and pebbles on the beach. Flat calm. Clear water.

Low heavy cloud. Heavy rain. Brisk northwesterly breeze. Air temperature 13°. Tide going out. Uneven covering of sand, with exposed rocks and scattered pebbles half way down to the shore. Small breakers.

Low thick cloud. A few clear patches. Brisk northerly breeze. Air temperature 13°. Sand piled against the sea wall then scoured away to reveal rocks, pebbles and then a good covering of sand. Big dumping breakers making it difficult to get into the water. A noticeable undertow. Sand very soft underfoot in places.
Rainy morning, sea at high tide. Turbulent and unpredictable with a very strong southwards pull. Seaweed, pebbles and sinking soft sand. Air and sea temperatures similar to yesterday.
Thick cloud. Intermittent light rain. Air temperature 13°. Strong northerly breeze. High tide. Sand then rocks and pebbles. Sand further out. Big breakers. Strong pull south.
Hazy sun. Thin cloud. Light north easterly breeze. Air temperature 15°. High tide. Sand then rocks and pebbles then sand again. Flat calm, some occasional small breakers.

Bright sunshine. High hazy cloud. Light south easterly breeze. Air temperature 21°. Flat calm. No surf. Clear water. Sandy underfoot. Sand piled against the sea wall then pebbles and exposed rocks before the sand starts again.
A bright morning, slightly hazy towards the horizon. Flat sea with occasional gentle move. Low tide, no rocks but seaweed widespread on the sea floor. Warm air, calm and quiet.
Sunny intervals. Hazy sun. Light westerly breeze. Air temperature 16°. Sand then rocks and pebbles then sand again to the shoreline. Flat calm. No surf. Clear water.

Bright sunshine. A few scattered clouds. Light northerly breeze. Air temperature 16°. Low tide. Exposed rocks on the beach. Pebbles then sand. A lot of weed on the beach. Exposed rocks in the water. Flat calm. No surf. A noticeable drift south.
Sunny, then increasingly heavy cloud. Light easterly breeze. Air temperature 17°. Low tide. Exposed rocks and scattered pebbles on the beach. Flat calm. No surf. Clear water.
High tide and flat water, very clear and feeling a little colder at 8am. Overcast sky but bright at the horizon.
Glorious sunny morning, good swimming in flat clear water an hour from high tide. Warm air temperature made the water feel cold at first.
Bright sunshine then increasingly heavy cloud. Light southerly breeze. Air temperature 18°. Tide coming in. Flat calm. Very clear water. Still some exposed rocks on the beach and scattered pebbles.
Bright sunshine. A few scattered clouds. Air temperature 19°. Light westerly breeze. Tide coming in almost full.
Bright sunshine. High thin cloud. Air temperature 20°. Light southerly breeze. Low tide. Flat calm. Still some pebbles and exposed rocks on the beach but more sand is beginning to cover them.
Glorious morning with the tide going out. Clear flat water and no rocks. Warm sunshine and water temperature similar to yesterday.

Bright sunshine. High broken cloud. Light westerly breeze. Air temperature 19°. Low tide. Sand against the sea wall then a band of rock and pebbles then sand again. There were exposed rocks underwater. The water was very clear. Flat calm.
Bright sunshine. High broken cloud. Stiff westerly breeze. Air temperature 17°. Tide going out. Low water. Still some rocks on the beach. Sand underwater. Clear water. Flat calm.
Sunny intervals then thickening cloud. Stiff N. westerly breeze. Air temperature 19°. Tide going out. Rocks and pebbles on the beach. Medium surf, some quite good waves.
Sunny intervals. Light south westerly breeze. Air temperature 17°. Tide coming in, almost full. The trench full of rocks and pebbles almost closed. Flat calm.
Bright sunshine. High thin cloud. Air temperature 17°. Light westerly breeze. A band of rocks and pebbles on the beach. Flat calm.

Sunny intervals. Thickening cloud from the west. Brisk south westerly breeze. Air temperature 17°. Low tide. Still exposed rocks on the beach and at the waterline. Very rocky underwater and very shallow to a long distance out to the sandbank. Flat calm.
Overcast. Sunny intervals. Stiff south westerly breeze. Air temperature 15°. Low tide. Exposed rocks on the beach. Flat calm.
Sunny intervals. Low heavy cloud. Light westerly breeze. Air temperature 17°. Low tide. Still a band of exposed rocks on the beach. Low tide. Flat calm.

Overcast. Low heavy cloud. Light south westerly breeze. Air temperature 18°. High tide on the turn. Quite a strong pull north. Small waves. The exposed rocks on the beach are gradually being covered by sand.
Bright sunshine. High thin cloud. Light north westerly breeze. Air temperature 15°. Still a few exposed rocks on the beach. An incoming tide. Flat calm. Clear water.
Overcast. Light easterly breeze. Air temperature 15°. Low tide. Exposed rocks on the beach. A lot of weed in the water. Some medium breakers. Tide running north. A mild pull out to sea.
Bright sunshine. Light westerly breeze. High thin cloud. Air temperature 15°. Low tide. Exposed rocks on the beach and underwater. Murky and dead flat.
Bright sunshine. Air temperature 17°. Brisk northerly breeze. Low tide. Medium breakers. A lot of exposed rocks on the beach. Some underwater.
Bright sunshine. Big fluffy clouds. Air temperature 13°. Low tide. Strong westerly wind. Exposed rocks on the beach but more sand than formerly. Sea flattened by the strong offshore wind.
Bright sunshine. High broken cloud. Air temperature 12°. Light north westerly breeze. Tide coming in slight full. Some flat out to sea but big dumping breakers onshore.
Overcast low heavy cloud. Air temperature 16°. Good covering of sand, no exposed rocks. Tide coming in. Flat calm. Light south westerly breeze.
Low heavy cloud. Misty. Very low tide. Light north easterly breeze. Air temperature 16°. Good covering of sand on the beach but exposed rocks underwater and at the shore line.
Overcast. Light north easterly breeze. Air temperature 14°. Flat calm. Small breakers. Good covering of sand. Exposed rocks at the waterline.
Overcast. Heavy low cloud lifting slowly. Sun trying to break through. Light north westerly breeze. Air temperature 12°. High tide beginning to go out. Calm out to sea but medium breakers.
Low heavy cloud breaking into stratocumulus stratiformis. Strong northerly wind. Air temperature 10°. Rising tide nearly full. Big breakers. Very strong pull seaward. Seaweed. Sandy beach.
Hazy cloud. Possible cirrostratus. Light southerly breeze. Air temperature 11°. Flat sea but big breakers. Strong pull seaward and southwards.
Low heavy unbroken cloud. Strong north westerly breeze. Air temperature 13°. Tide half way out. Medium breakers. Quite a strong pull seaward.
Bright sunshine. Cumulus humilis clouds. Air temperature 13°. Tide going out. Flat. Then sand on the beach. Rocks just beyond the surf line then sand a long way out to sea. Calm with small breakers.

Low cloud. Stratocumulus stratiformis. Sun trying to break through. Light south easterly breeze. Air temperature 13°. Tide going out. Slight pull north, slight pull seaward. Small breakers, rolling waves. Sand and exposed rock on the beach and underwater.
Low heavy cloud. Rain on the horizon and approaching. Light easterly breeze. Air temperature 13°. Tide going out. Distinct pull south and seaward. Small waves and medium breakers.

Bright sunshine. A few scattered clouds. Air temperature 11°. High tide on the turn. Flat sea but big dumping breakers. Some exposed rocks at the waterline. Quite a strong pull seaward beyond the first surf line.

Overcast. Low cloud. Sun trying to break through. Air temperature 7°. Light westerly breeze. Tide almost full. Big breakers. Strong pull seaward and south. Sandy beach but rocks and pebbles just offshore.
Overcast. Stiff south easterly breeze. Air temperature 12°. Scattered exposed rocks on the beach. Small breakers. Current running north.
Bright sunshine. Threads of cirrus uncinus (mare’s tails). Light southerly wind. Air temperature 14°. Low tide. Flat calm. A wide band of exposed rock just offshore, then a sandbank.
High thin cloud (stratocumulus stratiformis). Sun trying to break through. Air temperature 13°. Low tide. Flat calm. Sand. Pebbles piled against the sea wall. Light south westerly breeze.
Bright morning, sunrise over a clear horizon. Gentle swell of the water as the tide is coming in. No wind to cool the air temperature below 11° almost. A happy swim.
Sunny but with thickening clumps of altocumulus stratiformis. Light south westerly breeze. Air temperature 11°. Tide coming in. Flat calm.
Sunny, but with developing cumulus humilis. Light westerly breeze. Air temperature 14°. Tide coming in. Flat calm. Gravelly beach near the sea wall then smooth sand. A few small breakers.
Sunny stratocumulus lenticularis clouds. Air temperature 14°. Flat calm. Gravelly underfoot.
Overcast. Heavy low cloud. Sand and exposed rocks. Rocks underwater. Mild swell. Small breakers. A subtle steady pull seaward.
Low heavy cloud - and “anticyclonic gloom”. Light south westerly breeze. Air temperature 10°. Pebbles piled against the sea wall. Gravelly beach. Low tide. Flat calm.
Low heavy cloud. Air temperature 11°. Light south easterly breeze. Tide coming in. Some exposed rock underwater. Slight swell. Small breakers.

Low strato cumulus. Sun trying to break through. Light south westerly breeze. Air temperature 10°. Pebbles against the sea wall. Deep sand sloping to the shoreline. Pebbles at the shoreline and uneven sand. Flat calm. Tide coming in.
Thin cloud base. Pale weak sun. Air temperature 10°. Tide coming in. Flat calm. Small breakers. Light north westerly breeze.
Layers of light cloud: stratocumulus stratiformis. Sunny. Air temperature 12°. Tide coming flat but with some medium breakers. Light south westerly breeze.

Overcast. Light north westerly breeze. Air temperature 6°. No stones at the top of the beach. Tide coming in. Pebbles at the shoreline. Some exposed rocks. Some medium breakers. Quite a strong pull seaward.
Bright sunshine. High thin cloud. Air temperature 4°. Light north westerly breeze. Pebbles near the sea wall. Exposed rock on the beach. Medium breakers. Strong pull seaward.

Bright sunshine. High thin cloud: cirrus uncinus. Air temperature 4°. Flat calm but large powerful breakers - dumpers making it difficult to enter and exit the water. A very strong pull south. Pebbles piled against the sea wall. Pebbles and exposed rocks on the beach. Law’s Rock exposed. Tide coming in.
Overcast. Low thick cloud. Light south westerly breeze. Air temperature 6°. Tide coming in. Rocks and pebbles underwater. Very strong pull north. Some medium breakers.

Low broken cloud. Sun breaking through. Light westerly breeze. Air temperature 7°. Tide almost full. Pebbles against the sea wall. Rocks and pebbles underwater. Strong southerly pull. Flat calm but some strong dumping breakers.
Low broken cloud. Sun breaking through. Light southerly breeze. Air temperature 7°. Tide coming in. Good covering of sand. Lumpy sea. Medium breakers. Strong pull north.
Overcast then bright sunshine. Broken scattered cloud. Air temperature 12°. Sandy but a few rocks underwater. Tide coming in. A few medium breakers. Strong pull north and seawards.
Overcast. Low heavy cloud. Light south westerly breeze. Air temperature 4°. Low tide. Rocks. A strong pull seaward. Medium breakers.
Bright sunshine. High thin cloud. Air temperature 7°. Light westerly breeze. Flat calm. Slight swell near the shore. Medium breakers.
Stormy. Very high winds from the north. Turbid sea. Rocks on the waterline. Air temperature 9°.

Low heavy cloud. Light north easterly breeze. Air temperature 8°. Tide nearly full. Turbid water. Medium breakers. Very strong pull north and seawards. Pebbles piled against the sea wall and scattered on the beach.
Low heavy cloud. Strong westerly breeze. Air temperature 12°. Exposed rocks on the beach. Sand piled against the sea wall. Tide coming in. Sea flattened by the wind.

Low thin cloud. Light southerly breeze. Air temperature 9°. Sand piled against the sea wall. Pebbles and rocks on the beach. Law's Rock exposed. Tide coming in. Rocks underwater. Definite pull seaward. Flat calm. Small breakers.
Low stratocumulus. Air temperature 9°. Light south westerly breeze. Tide coming in. Turbid sea. Some medium breakers.
Bright sunshine. High cirrus. Strong westerly wind. Air temperature 6°. Flat calm. Tide coming in.
Low broken cloud. Sun breaking through. Light south westerly breeze. Air temperature 13°. Tide nearly full. Flat calm but big breakers. A very strong offshore pull.
Bright sunshine. Tide nearly full. Flat calm with small ripple and pull.
Bright sunshine. Sea flat but with strong pull at times.
Bright sunshine. High thin cloud. Light south westerly breeze. Air temperature 9°. Tide almost full. Uneven sand. Gravel and rocks. Flat calm. Small powerful breakers.
Low heavy cloud. Stratocumulus stratiformis. Light south westerly breeze. Air temperature 10°. Incoming tide. Flat calm. Exposed rocks underwater.
Low heavy cloud. Stormy. Strong wind. Rain. Air temperature 11°. Low tide. Exposed rocks. Turbulent sea. Medium breakers. Strong pull north and seaward. Stinging spray in the strong westerly wind.
Overcast. Low heavy cloud. Brisk north westerly breeze. Tide coming in. Some big powerful breakers. Strong pull seaward. Exposed rocks. Gravel and pebbles against the sea wall. Air temperature 6°.
Bright sunshine. Light north westerly breeze. Air temperature 3°. Medium breakers. Uneven sand. Exposed rocks. Strong pull.
Heavy skies. Light rain. Stiff easterly breeze. Air temperature 4°. Big breakers. Strong pull north and seaward. A lot of weed. Exposed rocks.

Bright sunshine. Light westerly breeze. Air temperature 3°. High tide starting to ebb. Large dumping breakers offshore. Smallish waves onto the beach. Large stones piled against the sea wall. A lot of exposed rock on the beach. Large exposed rocks underwater and stones and pebbles underfoot. Very difficult to get into and out of the water.
Bright sunshine. Light north westerly breeze. Air temperature 4°. Tide almost full. Medium breakers. Strong pull south. Pebbles and stones piled against the sea wall. Gravel and exposed rocks.
Hazy sunshine. Light south westerly breeze. Air temperature 3°. Tide coming in. Pebbles piled against the sea wall. Exposed rocks on the beach. Flat calm. Some small breakers.
Bright Sunshine, blue sky. 10°C air temperature, , flat calm but with a slight pull out to sea.
Bright sunshine. High cirrus clouds. Air temperature 8°. Light south westerly breeze. Low tide. Flat calm. Pebbles piled against the sea wall. Exposed rocks on the beach.
Grey skies and cloudy. Air temperature 0°C. Low tide, lots of rocks on the beach.
Grey skies and cloudy. Air temperature 6C. Low tide, lots of rocks exposed on the beach. Sea was flat with occasional tumble.
Storm Éowyn. Strong winds around 40mph. 2-3ft waves with a strong pull to the North. Air temp 7C. High tide with a scattering of rocks and pebbles exposed on the beach. TVLB kept watch.
Low heavy cloud. Moderate southerly breeze. Air temperature 5°. Tide almost full. Exposed rocks and scattered pebbles at the top of the beach. Flat calm. Small breakers.
Sunshine and stratocumulus clouds. Air temperature 5°. Light south westerly breeze. Incoming tide. Exposed rocks on the beach. Flat calm. Small breakers.
Low heavy cloud. Sunny intervals. Air temperature 6°. Light south westerly breeze. Low tide. Flat calm. Exposed rocks on the beach.
Low heavy cloud. Light rain. Stiff south westerly breeze. Air temperature 10°. Flat calm. Small breakers. Noticeable pull north. Exposed rocks on the beach but the sand is coming back.
Low heavy cloud. Sun trying to break through. Stiff easterly breeze. High tide. Medium breakers. Quite a turbid sea. Exposed rocks at the shoreline. Air temperature 6°.
Low heavy cloud. Drizzle. Air temperature 7°. Stiff easterly breeze. High tide. Medium breakers. Exposed rocks.

Low heavy cloud. Strong easterly breeze. Air temperature 6°. Misty. Sand piled against the sea wall. Pebbles and exposed rocks on the beach. Law's Rock visible. Incoming tide. Medium to large breakers. Turbid sea. Strong pull north.
Low heavy cloud. Misty. Drizzle. Air temperature 5°. Brisk south easterly breeze. Tide coming in. Pebbles and exposed rocks on the beach. Slight swell. Medium breakers.

Low heavy cloud lifting into “Altocumulus of a chaotic sky”. Brisk chilly south easterly breeze. Air temperature 4°. Low tide. A band of pebbles and exposed rocks midway down the beach. Sand higher at the foot of the steps. Choppy sea. Medium breakers.

Low heavy cloud beginning to lift and break up. Stratocumulus stratiformis. Air temperature 13°. Strong southerly wind. Tide coming in. Exposed rocks on the beach. Pebbles and exposed rocks at the shoreline then a bank of sand. Small to medium breakers. Noticeable pull north.

Low heavy cloud building from the west. Presaging an incoming storm. High winds. Heavy rain in the forecast. Air temperature 9°. Moderately choppy sea. Small breakers. Rocks and pebbles at the shoreline.
Low heavy cloud breaking up. Sun breaking through. Air temperature 9°. Moderate south easterly breeze. Tide coming in. Exposed rocks at the waterline. Flat calm. Slight swell. Light surf.

Bright sunshine scattered fluffy clouds (cumulus humilis). Light south westerly breeze Air temperature 10°. Low tide. Flat calm. Light surf Pebbles and exposed rocks on the beach a lot of exposed rock under the water.
Low heavy cloud mist over the sea drizzle. Air temperature 11°. Tide half in. Pebbles and exposed rocks on the beach. Flat calm.
Thick mist. Sun breaking through. Air temperature 10°. Light easterly breeze. Mixture of sand banks and pebbles and exposed rocks. Calm sea but some medium breakers.

Low cloud sun trying to break through stiff north easterly breeze. Air temperature 6°. Tide almost full. Large powerful breakers. Strong pull south. The sand has come back onto the beach. No exposed rocks and no pebbles except by the sea wall.

Low heavy cloud sunny intervals brisk north easterly breeze air temperature 6°. Low tide. A few scattered pebbles on the beach otherwise a good covering of sand. A lot of breakers, some medium some large and powerful. Quite unpredictable a strong pull south.
Low cloud breaking with sun breaking through. Stiff north easterly breeze Air temperature 8°. Low tide. Choppy sea. No big breakers. Pebbles and exposed rocks on the beach.
Bright sunshine high scattered cloud light south easterly breeze Air temperature 7°. Exposed rocks on the beach and underwater. Choppy sea. Small breakers.
Bright sunshine becoming misty. Low tide. Medium breakers. Air temperature 10°. Chilly south easterly breeze
Low heavy cloud mist. High tide. Big powerful breakers. Strong pull south. Stiff north easterly breeze Air temperature 8°.
Low heavy cloud: stratocumulus stratiformis Light northerly breeze. Air temperature 13°. Tide almost full. Good covering of sand. Flat calm.
Bright sunshine Gathering cloud Brisk westerly breeze. Air temperature 9°. Tide almost full. Flat calm.
Bright Sunshine Very strong north westerly wind. Air temperature 12° Low tide. Exposed rocks at the water line. Sandy beach. Pooled water flat calm sea but ruffled by the wind.
Bright sunshine Stiff south easterly breeze. Air temperature 10°. Low tide. A lot of rocks just offshore. A significant quantity of weed. Choppy sea.
Bright sunshine. Light north easterly breeze. Air temperature 10°. Low tide. Medium breakers. A slight pull seaward. Good covering of sand.
Bright sunshine. High cumulus clouds. Air temperature 9°. Moderate south easterly breeze. Tide almost full. Some big breakers. Quite a strong pull seaward.
Bright sunshine brisk south easterly breeze. Air temperature 10°. Tide coming in. Good covering of sand. Flat calm.
High hazy cloud Sunny intervals Air temperature 15°. Light westerly breeze. Tide going out. Flat sea but big heavy breakers. Strong backwash
Bright sunshine building cloud Air temperature 12°. Light westerly breeze. Flat calm.
Low hazy cloud misty. Pale sun trying to break through. Air temperature 10°. Low tide. Flat calm. Light north easterly breeze.
Overcast low heavy cloud. Light south easterly breeze Air temperature 11°. Low tide Flat calm.
Low thin cloud. Sun trying to break through. Light easterly breeze. Air temperature 9°. Tide coming in. Medium surf. Strong pull south
Low heavy cloud. Stiff south easterly breeze. Air temperature 10°. Tide coming in. Some big surf. Strong backwash.
Overcast. Light hazy cloud into rising cumulus. Sun peering through. Air temperature 12°. Light south westerly breeze. Flat calm. Small breakers
Bright sunshine high thin cloud Air temperature 10°. Stiff south westerly breeze. Incoming tide. Some strong surf.
Bright sunshine. Stratocumulus lenticularis clouds. Air temperature 16°. Moderate south westerly breeze Flat calm.
Bright sunshine. High cirrus Light south easterly breeze Air temperature 17°. Low tide. Flat calm. A mix of sand and rocks.
Bright sunshine cirrus and nascent cumulus clouds. Air temperature 12°. Light westerly breeze Flat calm.
Sunny intervals Low cumulus Strong northerly wind Air temperature 9°. High tide medium to large breakers. Some hard 'dumpers'. A strong pull south.
Low heavy cumulus breaking up Sun breaking through. Air temperature 9°. Tide coming in. Very strong pull south. Big dumping waves and violent surf.

Bright sunshine high thin cloud. Air temperature 12° Light easterly breeze. Tide coming in. Choppy sea. Some medium to large breakers Strong pull south and a pull seaward. Some rocks and weed underwater.
Bright sunshine cloudless sky Air temperature 14°. Brisk south easterly breeze Flat calm.
Bright sunshine. Air temperature 14°. Light south easterly breeze Flat calm
Early cloud burning off Bright sunshine. Air temperature 14°. Light north easterly breeze. Low tide. Some exposed rocks near the water slight swell no surf
Bright sunshine. High hazy cloud Air temperature 13°. Flat calm with some medium breakers. Strong pull south. Light north easterly breeze
Bright sunshine high thin cloud. Air temperature 11°. Light north easterly breeze. Tide almost full. Big powerful breakers. Strong pull south. Strong undertow. Foamy surf.
Bright sunshine Developing cumulus clouds. Air temperature 15°. Stiff westerly breeze. Incoming tide Flat calm.
Overcast brief sunny intervals Stiff south westerly breeze Air temperature 14°. Flat calm.
Low heavy cloud Moderate south westerly breeze Air temperature 14°. Low tide Flat calm. A lot of weed on the beach. Murky water.
Low heavy cloud. Sunny intervals. Intermittent heavy showers. Air temperature 15°. Flat calm.
Cumulus building from the west. Sunny intervals. Brisk south westerly breeze. Air temperature 15°. High tide. Medium breakers.
Cumulus building. Sunny intervals. Air temperature 15°. Light westerly breeze. Tide almost full. Flat calm. Good covering of sand. Clear water.
Sunny intervals. Clouding over. Air temperature 14°. Flat calm. Clear water. Light northerly breeze.
Sunny at first gradually clouding over. Cumulus. Air temperature 15°. Flat calm but slightly choppy. Light north westerly breeze.

Bright sunshine. Tide coming in. Slight swell but a strong current developed quickly and made conditions difficult and potentially dangerous. Two members struggled to get back to shore and were assisted by other swimmers.
Bright sunshine. High thin cloud. Light westerly breeze. Air temperature 19°. Low tide. Flat calm. No current.
